title: Move Real/Hourly/Year buttons and time display into Sun Effects section

requirements.text: Move the Real, Hourly, and Year mode buttons along with their corresponding time display from the bottom-right floating panel (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]) into the Sun Effects section inside the World Controls panel (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]). The buttons and time display must be rendered as a cohesive sub-section within Sun Effects, preserving all existing functionality (mode switching, time display updates).

quotes: Move the bottom right selected panel (Real Button, Hourly button, Year Button, and the corresponding time display) into the Sun Effects of the world controls button.

acceptanceCriteria: The Real, Hourly, and Year buttons appear inside the Sun Effects section of the World Controls panel.
The time display corresponding to the selected mode appears inside the Sun Effects section of the World Controls panel.
Clicking Real, Hourly, or Year buttons correctly switches the sun simulation mode as before.
The time display updates correctly according to the selected mode.
The bottom-right floating panel containing those buttons and time display is fully removed from the UI.

requirements.text: Remove the bottom-right floating panel (XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]) from the DOM entirely after its contents have been relocated to the Sun Effects section.

quotes: Move the bottom right selected panel (Real Button, Hourly button, Year Button, and the corresponding time display) into the Sun Effects of the world controls button.

acceptanceCriteria: The bottom-right panel is no longer rendered anywhere on the page.
No empty placeholder or ghost element remains in the bottom-right corner.

requirements.text: Preserve the existing UI layout and 3D globe unchanged. All other controls, panels, and the globe rendering must remain exactly as they are before this change.

quotes: Do not change the current UI layout and the 3d globe. All should remain unchanged

acceptanceCriteria: The 3D globe renders identically to before the change.
All other World Controls sections (other than Sun Effects receiving new content) are visually and functionally unchanged.
All other panels and UI elements outside the World Controls panel are unchanged.

constraints: Do not alter the 3D globe component or its rendering logic.
Do not modify any UI layout outside of moving the specified controls into Sun Effects.
Do not change existing button functionality or state management logic.
Immutable frontend paths (hooks, ui components, main.tsx) must not be edited.
nonGoals: Redesigning the Sun Effects section beyond accommodating the moved controls.
Adding new sun simulation modes or time display features.
Changing the World Controls panel layout beyond inserting the moved controls.
